$schemaComment: Single source of truth for the Labs app directory on the homepage (src/index.html) and 404 page (src/404.html). Run: npm run generate:labs-catalog. Per-app index.html shells stay separate for critical CSS, theme-color, and cookie consent.

apps.title: Darbuka Rhythm Trainer
apps.shortDescription: Learn and practice Darbuka drum rhythms

apps.title: Words in Rhythm
apps.shortDescription: Turn words and lyrics into playable darbuka rhythms

apps.title: Count Me In
apps.shortDescription: Configurable metronome with vocal counting, subdivisions, and more

apps.title: Chord Progression Generator
apps.shortDescription: Generate random chord progressions for practice and inspiration

apps.title: Find Your Pitch
apps.shortDescription: Sing into a mic for live note, cents, and contour feedback

apps.title: Learn Your Scales
apps.shortDescription: Guided curriculum for mastering piano scales and arpeggios

apps.title: Stanza
apps.shortDescription: Practice songs in sections with markers, loops, and a metronome

apps.title: Find the Beat
apps.shortDescription: Analyze music with BPM detection and visual beat guidance

apps.title: Piano Practice
apps.shortDescription: Practice piano with exercises, MIDI support, and realtime feedback

apps.title: Melodia Online
apps.shortDescription: Sight-singing: rhythm tap, audiation, sing with pitch trace and listen-back duet

apps.title: Vocal Agility Trainer
apps.shortDescription: Metronome subdivision drills with timing heatmaps and twelve optional palettes

apps.title: Encore
apps.shortDescription: Personal repertoire companion: songs, journals, performances, and Drive backup

apps.title: Zine Studio
apps.shortDescription: Format image files into zines for home or professional printing

apps.title: Color Sight Trainer
apps.shortDescription: Train value, relativity, and gamut perception in Oklch space

apps.title: Save the Cat Story Generator
apps.shortDescription: Generate random story plots from the Save the Cat beat structure

apps.title: Cat Clicker
apps.shortDescription: Click a cat for the greater good

apps.title: Corporate Ladder
apps.shortDescription: Crawl through the dungeons of corporate life
